name: @forgeax/game-hellforge
description: ForgeaX: Hellforge — Diablo II-flavoured action RPG sample. Female sorceress hero, encampment hub, switchable 2.5D ⇄ FPS view, skill-based combat, monster grinding + loot. Loaded by apps/preview via loadGame dynamic import.
